headline: Geovany Quenda
body: BREAKING: Geovany Quenda has joined Chelsea until 2034. Chelsea agreed a £40m deal to sign Quenda in March 2025, with the player staying at Sporting Lisbon for the 2025/26 season 🚨 Video
raw_text:
BREAKING: Geovany Quenda has joined Chelsea until 2034. 

Chelsea agreed a £40m deal to sign Quenda in March 2025, with the player staying at Sporting Lisbon for the 2025/26 season 🚨

Video
